name: nc-edit7-desktop
description: NC-Edit7 Desktop App based on Eclipse Theia

scripts.build:ext: node nc-edit7-extension/scripts/bundle.js && cd nc-edit7-extension && npm run compile
scripts.copy:ext: powershell -NoProfile -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path 'plugins/nc-edit7-extension' | Out-Null; robocopy 'nc-edit7-extension' 'plugins/nc-edit7-extension' /MIR /R:2 /W:1 /NFL /NDL /NJH /NJS /NP; if ($LASTEXITCODE -gt 7) { exit $LASTEXITCODE } else { exit 0 }"
scripts.build:electron: npm run build:ext && npm run copy:ext && electron-builder
